Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Bob turns a mistake into a success.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Happy Accident

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: Bob creates a mountain hideaway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Reflection

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: Bob paints a chilly morning scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: At Dawn's Light

Video.summary: Bob paints a quaint winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frosty Winter Morn

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Creek

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin nestled in a valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Haven in the Valley

Video.summary: Bob paints a frosty winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wintertime Blues

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene with sun and shadows.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunlight in the Shadows

Video.summary: Bob paints a pastel seashore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pastel Seascape

Video.summary: Bob paints a lake and grassy mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Ridge Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Reflections of Gold

Video.summary: Bob paints a lush island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Island Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a misty forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest Edge

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splendor of a Snowy Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints trees overlooking gentle waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: River's Peace

Video.summary: Bob paints flowers at sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisies at Dawn

Video.summary: Bob paints a hidden fishing spot.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Cove

Video.summary: Bob paints a peaceful, misty forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Silent Forest

Video.summary: Bob paints sky, stream and snowy peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Gray Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints a breathtaking scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Spectacular View

Video.summary: Bob paints a river in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest River

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daybreak

Video.summary: Bob paints a farm in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter at the Farm

Video.summary: Bob paints a picturesque barn.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Roadside Barn

Video.summary: Bob paints an East Coast mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Secluded Mountain

Video.summary: Bob creates a glowing effect on a lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow

Video.summary: Bob paints a monochromatic scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Knoll

Video.summary: Bob paints autumn colors.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bright Autumn Trees

Video.summary: Bob paints a seaside sunset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Over the Waves

Video.summary: Waves crash against a moonlit shore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Seascape

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Steep Mountains

Video.summary: A bubbling stream, a distant waterfall and tumultuous skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Waterfall

Video.summary: Truly picture perfect; a bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Reflections

Video.summary: Warm summer mountain water and luxurious green grass.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Brown Mountain

Video.summary: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape, painted half black and half white.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black & White Seascape

Video.summary: A bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lazy River

Video.summary: A slow river winds around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black River
